description_long: This is a military-style propeller airplane with a robust, gray fuselage and a distinctive four-bladed propeller at the nose. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, featuring visible hardpoints for external stores or armaments. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be configured for two crew members in tandem seating. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which are extended. Markings and insignia on the fuselage and wings suggest a military or naval affiliation.
description: A gray, military-style propeller airplane with a mid-mounted straight wing, tandem cockpit, and tricycle landing gear, featuring visible hardpoints and military insignia.
description_view_0: Side view showing the four-bladed propeller, tandem cockpit, and mid-mounted straight wing with visible hardpoints.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, symmetrical wing layout, and extended tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and wing hardpoints.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles; equipped with hardpoints for external stores.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a four-bladed propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear canopy, configured for two seats.
